zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Charteris of Amisfield於1547年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾阿米斯費爾德時，他的父親Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield12歲，母親Mrs John Charteris13歲。他於1581年8月12日之前與Lady Agnes Maxwell在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1616年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Charteris of Amisfield于1547年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾阿米斯費爾德时，他的父亲Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield12岁，母亲Mrs John Charteris13岁。他于1581年8月12日之前与Lady Agnes Maxwell在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1616年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Charteris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: from the city of Chartres in N France; see Charters .

variants.name: Charters
meanings: Scottish (Kirkcudbrightshire) and northern English: habitational name of Norman origin from the French city of Chartres, named for a Gaulish tribe, recorded in Latin sources as the Carnutes, whose seat it was.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Charteris of Amisfield was born in 1547, in Amisfield, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield, was 12 and his mother, Mrs John Charteris, was 13. He married Lady Agnes Maxwell before 12 August 1581, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1616, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Charteris of Amisfield est né en 1547, à Amisfield, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Charteris, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agnes Maxwell avant 12 août 1581, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1616, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Charteris of Amisfield 1547 in Amisfield, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield 12 und seine Mutter Mrs John Charteris 13. Er hat vor 12. August 1581 in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland Lady Agnes Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1616 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Charteris of Amisfield è nato il nel 1547 nel Amisfield, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John Charteris, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Lady Agnes Maxwell prima del 12 agosto 1581, nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1616, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Charteris of Amisfieldが1547年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアミスフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfieldは12歳，母Mrs John Charterisは13歳であった。1581年8月12日以前にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスでLady Agnes Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1616年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Charteris of Amisfield(이)가 1547년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 아미스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Charteris(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1581년 8월 12일 이전 스컷랜드 커kc드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 Lady Agnes Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1616년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Charteris of Amisfield nasceu em 1547, em Amisfield, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Mrs John Charteris, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agnes Maxwell antes 12 de agosto de 1581, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1616, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Charteris of Amisfield родился в 1547 г. в местности амисфиелд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Charteris 9th of Amisfield было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Charteris, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agnes Maxwell перед 12 августа 1581 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1616 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Lady Agnes Maxwell antes de 12 de agosto de 1581, en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas.
